records.title: Understanding Borneo Through Trusted Data
records.content: Borneo Tracker brings environmental, social and sustainability indicators together in one clear and accessible platform. We support public awareness, regional monitoring and evidence-informed decisions by making Borneo's sustainability data easier to explore, compare and understand. Forest cover, deforestation, air quality, water quality and fire hotspots. Poverty, employment, education, healthcare and clean water access. Regional performance across priority Sustainable Development Goals. Every indicator includes its source and update information so users can understand where the data comes from and how it supports the dashboard. Borneo Tracker supports awareness and monitoring. For emergencies, always contact the relevant official emergency services.

records.title: Difference Between ESG and SDG
records.content: ESG is a framework for grouping environmental, social and governance indicators. SDGs are global sustainable development goals. Borneo Tracker can map some indicators to both views when a relationship is configured.

records.title: Website Usage
records.content: Use the dashboard for map and indicator snapshots, Regional Details for territory comparisons, ESG and SDG pages for indicator groupings, News for published insights, Community for discussions, and Generate Report for PDFs.

records.title: Forest Cover
records.content: Forest Cover is an environmental indicator intended to describe the extent or share of land covered by forest. This placeholder does not include any live value, year or statistic.

records.title: Generate Report
records.content: A citable ESG & SDG data profile for one territory — every indicator we've gathered, explained in plain language and downloadable as a PDF. Built for compliance buyers, suppliers and investors, not just internal dashboards. 1. Select Territory 2. Include Sections Executive Summary SDG Coverage Coverage & Limitations Methodology & Sources Generate & Download PDF
